title: Rushing The Stem
diagnosis: The student answers before identifying what the question is actually asking.
correctionPrompt: Underline the command word first: closest, except, main idea, assumption, inference.

title: Using Formula Without Units
diagnosis: The formula is remembered, but the values are placed without checking units.
correctionPrompt: Write the formula, convert units, then substitute values.

title: Memorising Words Without Context
diagnosis: The student knows a rough meaning but misses the sentence context.
correctionPrompt: Learn each word with one synonym, one antonym and one exam sentence.

title: Not Eliminating Weak Options
diagnosis: The student searches only for the right answer and ignores obviously wrong choices.
correctionPrompt: Cancel two weak options before choosing between the remaining two.
